text:
Overview

Itajaga (イタジャガ) is a line of snack and trading card products from Bandai sold in stores. They have collaborated with many popular anime and manga in the past, and in July of 2023, began collaborating with Hunter × Hunter. The cards found in Itajaga packs feature new and unique illustrations of Hunter × Hunter characters, with packs typically containing one card from the set and a snack. The SP rarity cards in all of the collabs are gold-foiled. 

HUNTER×HUNTER

The first Itajaga collab with Hunter × Hunter, simply titled HUNTER×HUNTER, https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2023/4549660957966000.html released on July 24 th , 2023. The full set contains 25 different cards, with 16 N rarity cards, 4 R rarity cards, and 5 SP rarity cards, mostly featuring the main quartet and various members of the Phantom Troupe. The snack flavour for this collab was lightly salted.

Until December 16, 2023, Bandai Candy also offered a box of 20 packs of the product that could be pre-ordered from their website. In addition, from July 21, 2023, to July 30, 2023, Bandai ran a social media campaign where five winners could win a 20-pack box for free. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1682299939936944128 

Below is a list of the cards in this collab:

HUNTER×HUNTER2

HUNTER×HUNTER2 was the second collab in the series and released on January 29 th , 2024. It was also available for pre-order as early as November 2023 through Premium Bandai https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1719625534966296833 . The full set contains 26 cards, with 14 N rarity cards, 6 R rarity cards, and 5 SP rarity cards, featuring a similar cast of characters as the previous collab, but with fewer members of the Phantom Troupe and additional members of the Zoldyck Family who were not featured at all in the first collab. This collab features the same lightly salted snack flavour as the previous collab.

Like the first collab, Premium Bandai also offered a 20-pack box that was available for pre-order only until December 16, 2024.

Below is a list of the cards in this collab:

HUNTER×HUNTER3

HUNTER×HUNTER3 is the third and most recent collab in the series, released on February 17 th , 2025. The full set contains 27 cards, with 16 N rarity cards, 6 R rarity cards, and 5 SP rarity cards, and is the first collab in the series to feature the Chimera Ants. This collab features the same lightly salted snack flavor as the two previous collabs.

A 20-back box is available through Premium Bandai. The 20-pack box was also offered as a prize for their social media campaign promoting the collab. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1891306667188584702 The giveaway for the campaign ended on February 23 rd , 2025.
